key_numbers.label: Estimated receipts increase for FY 2016 and FY 2017 combined

events.description: Special session legislation, Sub HB 2001, was enacted.
The Consensus Group will meet to consider revisions to the newly adjusted FY 2017 estimates and to make the initial estimates for FY 2018 and FY 2019.

evidence.quote: The most recent estimates of State General Fund (SGF) receipts for FY 2017 have been adjusted to reflect legislation enacted during the 2016 special session.
